author: verifily
name: Verifily Data Quality: Three-Tier Token Weighting + DCLS Salience + Complementary Eval
blurb: Layered on top of SOTA XSA+GPTQ+BigramHash baseline. Three data-quality components validated locally (M4 Max, -0.63% BPB vs baseline): (1) GPU-resident bigram statistics for complementary training — tokens predictable by bigrams get 0.10 weight (soft nudge), freeing neural capacity for harder tokens. (2) Three-tier token classification: Predictable (0.10w, top ~5%), Frontier (1.0w), Noise (0.70w) based on bigram probability + document quality signals (vocabulary richness, repetition). Data-driven thresholds (~p95 bigram, median quality). (3) DCLS-inspired salience tracker: surprise-driven batch loss multiplier [0.85, 1.15]. (4) Quality-conditioned eval-time bigram mixer: alpha conditioned on document quality.
technique_summary: Verifily three-tier token weighting + DCLS salience + quality-conditioned bigram mixer, on SOTA XSA+GPTQ+BigramHash base
